name: T4.0-real-screen-only-diagnostic
description: Diagnostic config — only SCStream on the main display, NO compositor, NO writers. Drives the metronome for 10 seconds, counts how many frames SCStream's delegate actually delivers. Pure test of whether real-screen capture works in this process at all, without any consumer back-pressure from downstream writers. If accepted_last_sec tracks close to 30 with active screen use, SCStream is fine and our earlier observations were writer-induced back-pressure. If it stays at 0.3/sec with activity, something about this process's relationship with SCStream is broken.
